headline: Tech selloff as investors flee to healthcare
detail: Rotation out of tech into defensive sectors signals institutional risk reduction. This is a direct headwind for your entire book — AVGO, PLTR, CRWD, SMH, QQQI are all in the crossfire. On margin, sector-wide selling accelerates drawdowns.

headline: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on Digital Services Taxes
detail: Any escalation here hits large-cap tech revenue and multiples fast. Names like AVGO and PLTR, already under pressure, could see additional selling if this threat hardens into policy. Watch for tech sector reaction at the open.

headline: ON Semi tanks 24% on Synaptics deal
detail: ON Semi is a chip-sector name — a 24% single-day drop on a deal gone wrong is a reminder how fast semiconductor stocks can reprice. SMH holds chip stocks broadly, so watch for any sympathy pressure dragging your HOLD there.

headline: Qualcomm challenges Nvidia in data centers
detail: Competitive pressure on Nvidia's data-center dominance is worth watching since it affects chip-sector sentiment broadly, including AVGO and SMH. No immediate price impact, but it's a narrative shift in the space you're concentrated in.
